scores.justification: Each of the 17+ surfaced issues includes an explicit severity label (HIGH/MEDIUM) and specific, actionable remediation steps with concrete commands (e.g., `ctl pipeline run pipe-07 --resume`, `ctl search --reindex`) or procedures (e.g., review flagged orders o102/o107/o115, check email delivery logs for @gmail).
